display.purpose: Page titles only; never a marketing hero scale.

body.purpose: Forms, tables, explanatory text, and normal UI copy.

label.purpose: Badges, compact metadata, and small navigation labels.

shadows.name: surface-ring
shadows.purpose: Default boundary for cards and dialogs.

shadows.name: popover-shadow
shadows.purpose: Only for floating select content, tooltip content, and menus.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Dialog, select, and tooltip fade/zoom state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for save, scan, submit, and add operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 32px; background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-primary-foreground); padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button for refresh, test connection, and lower-risk operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 32px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-input) 30%, transparent); color: var(--color-foreground); padding: 8px 16px; font: 500 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-input) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Pill-shaped text field for settings, search, and connection forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--color-foreground); font: 500 14px/1.3 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 32px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-input) 30%, transparent); color: var(--color-foreground); padding: 4px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Section Panel
components.description: Standard settings and management container with a separated header and action area.
components.html:
媒体源

管理 WebDAV 来源和认证信息。

内容区域
components.css: .ds-panel { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 20px; background: var(--color-card); color: var(--color-card-foreground); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-foreground) 10%, transparent); font: 400 14px/1.5 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-header { display: flex; align-items: start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); padding: 24px; } .ds-panel-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-panel-header p { margin: 4px 0 0; color: var(--color-muted-foreground); font-size: 14px; } .ds-panel-body { padding: 24px; } .ds-panel-action { border: 0; border-radius: 32px; background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-primary-foreground); padding: 8px 14px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact semantic status marker for media items, tasks, and review states.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; height: 20px; width: fit-content; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px; white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); padding: 2px 8px; font: 500 12px/1.2 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-warning { border-color: rgb(245 158 11 / 0.3); background: rgb(245 158 11 / 0.15); color: #fcd34d; } .ds-badge-success { border-color: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.3); background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.15); color: #6ee7b7; } .ds-badge-error { border-color: rgb(239 68 68 / 0.3); background: rgb(239 68 68 / 0.15); color: #fca5a5; }

components.name: Media Item Card
components.description: Poster-led card for top-level movie or TV folders; the main place where Renarr can feel more like a media library.
components.html:
海报

示例剧集

2026 · 12 个视频

已整理
components.css: .ds-media-card { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 20px; background: var(--color-card); color: var(--color-card-foreground); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-foreground) 10%, transparent); } .ds-media-card:focus-within, .ds-media-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary) 50%, transparent); } .ds-poster { aspect-ratio: 2 / 3; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: var(--color-muted); color: var(--color-muted-foreground); font: 400 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-media-body { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 12px; } .ds-media-body h3 { margin: 0; color: var(--color-foreground); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-media-body p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted-foreground); font-size: 12px; } .ds-media-badge { width: fit-content; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgb(16 185 129 / 0.3); background: rgb(16 185 129 / 0.15); color: #6ee7b7; padding: 2px 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Persistent left navigation for media libraries, settings, tasks, and logs.
components.html: 媒体库媒体设置任务队列
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; border-right: 1px solid var(--color-sidebar-border); background: var(--color-sidebar); color: var(--color-sidebar-foreground); padding: 20px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar a { border-radius: 8px; color: inherit; padding: 8px 12px; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-sidebar a:hover, .ds-sidebar .ds-nav-active { background: var(--color-sidebar-accent); color: var(--color-sidebar-accent-foreground); font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: Renarr 的界面应像一张深色暗室里的编目台：用户面对的是远端片库的真实目录、状态、任务和风险动作，而不是消费型媒体首页。系统可以有影视资料感，尤其在海报卡、片名、年份、剧集信息和文件摘要上，但视觉重心始终是整理、核对和确认。整体气质是深色、稳定、资料化、可长期使用。
keyCharacteristics: 深色管理台，面板分层清楚，长时间使用不刺眼。
影视资料馆感来自真实媒体内容，不来自花哨装饰。
左侧导航、设置表单、任务表、日志表和媒体卡使用同一组件词汇。
操作要能追溯到后端状态，危险动作必须让用户看清影响范围。
密度服务于重复管理任务，避免首页式大留白和营销式叙事。

rules.name: The ≤10% Accent Rule
rules.body: `primary` 在单个屏幕中的面积应保持在 10% 以下。它用于行动和状态，不用于装饰。

rules.name: The Real Status Rule
rules.body: 状态色必须对应真实状态：失败、待审核、运行、成功、待整理。不要为了“丰富页面”添加没有业务含义的颜色。

rules.name: The No Hero Type Rule
rules.body: Renarr 是管理台，不是宣传页。任何超过 `text-2xl` 的 UI 标题都必须有明确的信息架构理由。

rules.name: The Tonal Layer Rule
rules.body: 常驻内容用背景深浅和 1px 边界分层，禁止用宽模糊投影制造卡片感。

dos: Do 使用 shadcn-svelte 组件作为基础控件，局部视觉差异通过页面级 class 或项目组件封装。
Do 让 `primary` 只出现在主要行动、焦点、选中和重要链接上。
Do 让海报、片名、年份和文件统计承担影视资料馆感。
Do 在列表里用 Switch、Checkbox、Badge 和 Button 表达真实可操作状态。
donts: Don't 把 Renarr 做成以播放和推荐为中心的流媒体娱乐应用。
Don't 做营销介绍、巨幅 hero、装饰卡片或首页式价值主张区。
Don't 使用炫技动效、强烈渐变、gradient text、glassmorphism 或无业务含义的装饰色。
Don't 把添加表单、配置入口和危险操作长期堆在内容卡片里。
Don't 做只在前端临时切换、没有真实后端持久化的假控制台。
